title: Umami Fresh Vietnamese pea eggplant Bake
description: Savory and nostalgic Vietnamese dish featuring thin eggplant slices topped with a sweet and salty pea mixture, finished on a robata grill for a smoky finish.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the eggplant into 1/2 inch thick rounds and salt lightly, letting them drain for 10 minutes.
In a bowl combine peas, soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar, sesame oil, minced garlic, and minced ginger.
Place the eggplant slices on the grill and cook until charred markings appear, about 3 to 4 minutes per side.
While the eggplant is grilling, transfer the pea mixture to a small skillet and heat until warmed through.
Once the eggplant is ready, top each slice with the warm pea mixture.
Return the topped slices to the grill for an additional 2 minutes to meld flavors.
Drizzle a small amount of sesame oil over the top and sprinkle with chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve the baked eggplant hot, optionally with steamed rice or rice noodles.
Enjoy the umami-packed Vietnamese pea eggplant bake.
